dragon-soul-orb.name: Dragon Soul Orb
dragon-soul-orb.description: A crystal sphere humming with the memories of draconic flame.

hunter-charm.name: Hunter's Charm
hunter-charm.description: A carved tooth charm worn by scouts who trust their instincts.

falcon-talon-charm.name: Falcon Talon Charm
falcon-talon-charm.description: A silver-wrapped talon said to sharpen a ranger's eye at dawn.

war-banner-charm.name: War Banner Charm
war-banner-charm.description: A braided cord cut from an old battle standard. It stirs courage in the blood.

lucky-bone.name: Lucky Bone
lucky-bone.description: A tiny carved charm every cutpurse swears kept them alive one more night.

sun-charm.name: Sun Charm
sun-charm.description: A brass sunburst worn close to the heart during long vigils.

prayer-beads.name: Prayer Beads
prayer-beads.description: Each bead marks a vow, a loss, or a miracle survived.

shadow-cord.name: Shadow Cord
shadow-cord.description: A knotted cord worn against skin that dampens footfall and quickens movement.

iron-tooth.name: Iron Tooth
iron-tooth.description: A molar replaced with iron. Warriors wear them as trophies.

focus-shard.name: Focus Shard
focus-shard.description: A sliver of crystal that steadies the mind when gripped.

battle-scar-token.name: Battle Scar Token
battle-scar-token.description: A coin-sized brand mark worn proudly by veterans.

enchanted-compass.name: Enchanted Compass
enchanted-compass.description: Always points toward danger—or away from it, depending on the holder.

runic-dice.name: Runic Dice
runic-dice.description: Loaded with fate magic. Every roll feels deliberate.

blessed-relic.name: Blessed Relic
blessed-relic.description: A fingerbone of a minor saint, wrapped in gold thread.

survival-kit.name: Survival Kit
survival-kit.description: A compact pouch of herbs, wire, and flint. Never leave camp without it.

warlord-tooth.name: Warlord's Tooth
warlord-tooth.description: Ripped from a beast-king. Radiates primal dominance.

void-marble.name: Void Marble
void-marble.description: A marble-sized hole in reality. Stare too long and it stares back.

gambler-coin.name: Gambler's Coin
gambler-coin.description: Heads you win. Tails they lose. It has never landed on its edge.

sacred-bone.name: Sacred Bone
sacred-bone.description: A rib from a temple guardian who died protecting the innocent.

windcatcher-charm.name: Windcatcher Charm
windcatcher-charm.description: A feathered charm that catches favorable winds and ill omens alike.

blood-idol.name: Blood Idol
blood-idol.description: A figurine carved from solidified blood. It pulses with warmth.

fate-die.name: Fate Die
fate-die.description: A six-sided die where every face shows the same number: yours.

miracle-splinter.name: Miracle Splinter
miracle-splinter.description: A splinter from the True Cross. Wounds close in its presence.

stormcaller-feather.name: Stormcaller Feather
stormcaller-feather.description: A thunderbird feather that crackles with static between your fingers.
